name: Beef & Brown Rice Stew
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces beef chuck, visible fat removed, cut into 3/4-inch chunks
1 1/4 cups uncooked long grain brown rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Heat oil in a 4-quart Dutch oven over medium heat.
3. Add onions and cook, stirring often, for 7 minutes until translucent.
4. Add spices and meat. Cook for 5 to 6 minutes, stirring 2 or 3 times.
5. Stir in water, tomatoes, rice, and bouillon cubes. Bring mixture to a boil.
6. Cover and bake for 1 to 1 1/4 hours until rice and meat are tender.
7. Stir in green beans. Cover.
8. Bake for an additional 10 minutes until green beans are tender.
